lagareiro-style-octopus-with-red-wine-te.name: Lagareiro-style Octopus With Red Wine
lagareiro-style-octopus-with-red-wine-te.original_name: Polvo à lagareiro com vinho tinto
instructions: Put the octopus in a pan with some water and take it to the fire. When it starts boiling, count 15 minutes and then remove it from the fire. Transfer the octopus to a strainer, pass it through cold water and let it cool.
Wash the chips thoroughly and put them on a board. Season them with plenty of salt and put them in the oven, preheated at 185°C, until cooked.
Wash the peppers, remove their seeds and cut them into strips. Peel and cut the onions in half and the garlic in circles. Cut the octopus into big pieces.
Lay the octopus on a tray, season it with olive oil, garlic, wine, blond, thyme, colorau, salt and pepper. Add the onions and stir. Take it in the oven, preheated to 190°C, for 15 minutes.

Give the chips a punch and add them to the octopus after the time indicated above. Also have the peppers on top and put them back in the oven for another 15 minutes. Serve with grelos or spinach, previously cooked and sautéed.

lamb-chops-with-lemon-and-herbs.name: Lamb Chops With Lemon And Herbs

ingredients.item: Lamb rib chops (from three 1 1/4- to 1 1/2-pound racks of lamb
ingredients.prep: cut between bones into individual chops)

instructions: Mix minced shallots, chopped mint, chopped oregano, minced garlic, sugar, and 1 tablespoon salt in small bowl. Press 1 rounded teaspoon shallot-herb mixture onto eye of each lamb chop. Turn chops over onto large rimmed baking sheet. Press remaining shallot- herb mixture onto eye of each chop. Cover lamb chops with sheet of plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.

Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, and lemon peel in small bowl until slightly thickened and well blended. Season lightly with salt and generously with freshly ground black pepper. Spoon oil mixture lightly over chops. Turn chops over and spoon remaining oil mixture over. Let stand at room temperature 1 hour.
Prepare barbecue (medium-high heat). Grill lamb chops to desired doneness, about 3 minutes per side for medium-rare. Transfer lamb chops to platter. Garnish with fresh oregano sprigs and serve.

lamb-shoulder-with-citrus-fennel-salad.name: Lamb Shoulder With Citrus-fennel Salad

ingredients.prep: finely grated, plus 2 heads, halved crosswise
mandarin, and navel), peeled, halved, sliced or torn into small sections

instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Using a sharp knife, score fat across the top of lamb shoulder to create a crosshatch pattern, cutting about ¼" deep and spacing cuts about ¾" apart. Season generously all over with salt and pepper.

Combine grated garlic, oil, red pepper flakes, grated zest, and 2 Tbsp. rosemary in a small bowl. Rub all over lamb, working into score marks and anywhere there is an opening. Place lamb in a large cast-iron skillet or baking dish. (At this point the lamb can be covered and chilled up to 1 day if you want to break up the prep.)

Arrange garlic heads, cut side down, around lamb and add strip of zest. Pour in wine and cover tightly with foil. Roast until meat is falling off the bone and fork-tender, 5–5½ hours. Keep covered and let rest 30 minutes.
Gently toss orange pieces and fennel with lemon juice in a medium bowl; season lightly with salt.
Tear the meat off the bones in large pieces and mound on a platter. Arrange citrus and fennel salad next to meat. Top meat with more rosemary and drizzle pan juices over.
Do Ahead: Lamb can be roasted 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Gently reheat, covered, in a 300° oven until warmed all the way through, at least 1 hour, before serving.

lamb-stewed-with-vegetables-teleculinari.name: Lamb Stewed With Vegetables
instructions: Get the fish and season it with salt, pepper and lemon juice. Book for 15 minutes.
Arranje a couve, retirando a parte mais dura; descasque as batatas e as cenouras e corte-as em cubinhos.
Refogue a cebola e os alhos, descascados e picados, num tacho com o azeite quente, depois junte o louro e a polpa de tomate, tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe cozinhar, durante 5 minutos.

Add the potatoes and carrots, cover with hot water and cook for 15 minutes. After that time, add the cabbage and let cook for another 12 minutes. Finally, add the fish and finish cooking (about 15 minutes). Serve the lamb, decorated with parsley.

lamb-with-apricots-argiro.name: Lamb With Apricots
instructions: Sauté the meat in a pot for 4 minutes, until golden.
Place on a platter and sauce the onion, garlic and leave for 5 minutes.
Put the meat back in the pot and put it out with the cognac.
Add the broth, zest, orange juice, honey, cinnamon.
Add salt and pepper.
Cover and let the food bottle on low heat for 1 hour.
Open the lid and add the apricots cut in half, as well as the mint, and let it bottle for another 30 minutes, until the sauce melts.
Just before we lower the food from the fire, add the almonds, mix and serve.

lasagna-with-minced-meat-argiro.name: Lasagna With Minced Meat
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wide and shallow pot, over medium to strong heat.
Sauté the fined meat with bacon for about 7–8 minutes, until golden and change color.
When the liquids Evaporate and dry well, add the chopped vegetarians (onion, carrot, cellery). Sauté for 4-5 minutes, stringing freshly until the onion softens and becomes transparent.
Add the garage and tomato paste, and continue the sauce for 1–2 minutes. With the seed rub the base of the pot to unstick the delicious residues and release the aromas of the paste.
Add the wine (red or white) and allow the volume to evaporate by half.
Add the leaves, thyme, parsley stems and chopped tomatoes. Cover the ingredients with some water.
When the sauce is boiled, lower the heat to medium to low, cover with lid and simmer for about 1 hour and 30 minutes, until the minced meat melts well.
To the end of cooking, optionally, add the milk and let it simmer for a few more minutes.
During building, mix 3–4 times so that the fined meat does not stick.
Salt and pepper towards the end of cooking.

lean-and-green.name: Lean And Green
instructions: Blend spinach, banana, apple, strawberries, mango, milk, protein powder, and honey together in a blender until smooth.

leek-moussaka-recipe-lezzet.name: Leek Moussaka Recipe

ingredients.item: Instead of scaling, you can prepare a thicker and hearty musakka using cooked beef. a lighter to choose chicken mint can also be preferred.
Tomato salçin addition to half a meal of pepperyou can make the flavor of the dish deeper.
To be compatible with pırasa instead of onion interior you can add fine snacks onions.

Add to cube melt or potatoes you can color both and improve the results.
You can add acne to kimyon,red powder pepper or a small amount of thyme.
A more Juicy meal for place of hot water, you can use the flavor strengthened.
If you want to prepare a non-polluted version, you can create a rich alternative from spicy protein hungry adding green lentil.

instructions: 1. Clean and cut the root part.
2. Eat half a month after washing with plenty of water.
3. Kü onion;cuk cubes in the form.
4. Take liquid oil to the pot and roast the onion until pink.
5. Add to the water and continue roasting until the water is shaken &ccedil.

leeks-en-cocotte.name: Leeks En Cocotte

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Slice each leek in half lengthwise without cutting all the way through the other side; rinse under cold water (gently opening layers) until water runs clear. Pat dry.

Heat oil in a large skillet with a lid over medium-high heat. Add shallot and bacon and cook, stirring, until bacon is crisp, about 3 minutes. Add garlic and leeks, season with salt and pepper, and cook, occasionally turning leeks and stirring gently, until leeks are bright green, about 5 minutes.

Add wine to skillet; bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until slightly reduced, about 2 minutes. Add broth; bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, partially covered, until leeks are just tender, 8–10 minutes longer. Mix in butter. Serve leeks topped with chives.
DO AHEAD: Leeks can be rinsed 1 day ahead. Wrap in a damp paper towel and chill.

lelas-pork-chili.name: Lela's Pork Chili
instructions: Place flour in a paper bag. Add pork and shake to coat.
Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat for 2 to 3 minutes. Add pork and fry until browned, 5 to 7 minutes.
Add 1/2 of the chicken stock and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and boil for 15 to 20 minutes.

Blend diced tomatoes in a blender. Add to the pot along with remaining chicken stock, green chile and jalapeno peppers, garlic, onion powder, garlic powder, garlic salt, cumin, and black pepper. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour.

Serve immediately or, if chili needs to be thicker, blend water and cornstarch in a bowl. Bring chili to a boil, and whisk in cornstarch mixture. Reduce heat and let chili thicken for a few minutes before serving.

lemon-and-rosemary-tapenade-olive-paste-.name: Lemon And Rosemary Tapenade (olive Paste)
lemon-and-rosemary-tapenade-olive-paste-.original_name: Tapenade de limão e alecrim (pasta de azeitonas)
instructions: Brush the olives and pinch with a knife to get very small pieces. Put it on a pusher and press with the back of a spoon to drain the excess water well.
Place the olives in a bowl and mix the lemon and rosemary stems. Finally add the olive oil and stir well. Serve on the bread slices previously toasted.

lemon-poppy-seed-gluten-free-cake-recipe.name: Lemon Poppy Seed Gluten-free Cake Recipe
lemon-poppy-seed-gluten-free-cake-recipe.original_name: Lemon Poppy Gluten Free Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: 1/2 cup liquid oil (zeytiny or sunflower oil)
You can use almond flour, coconut flour or ricen&ccedil instead of ready gluten-free flour mixture.
When changing the waste mix, it is not too dry internal push may need to increase the amount of liquid to light.
Powder sugar rather than of brunette sugar, coconut sugar or maple seeds can be used.
Choose from an alternative to erythritol or stevia.
Instead of yogurt milk, milk or peel milk you can use.
Change liquid oil for olive oil or coconut oil can be preferred.
You can use orange peel reindeer instead of lemon peel; it adds a different flavor.
Lime juice can be used instead of lemon juice.
Instead of poppy seeds, you can get a different texture and aroma with kinoa, chia or sesame.
Vanilin instead of vanilla extract;improve aroma density.

instructions: 1. Heat oven 175°C’ye.
2. Oil your cake mold and sprinkle flour or gluten-free flour mixture.
3. Mix gluten free flour, baking powder, carbonate, salt and poppy seeds in a bowl.
4. Up to roughing with eggs and sugar mixers
5. Add and mix yogurt/silk, liquid oil, lemon grater and lemon juice.
6. Add dry materials to liquid mix and mix with spatulas with gentleç, get a dried dough.
7. To the dough cake mold pourpreheated oven for 35-40 minutes.
8. Check Kü with test; clean if your cake is cooked.
9. After cooling the cake u you can sprinkle the sugar on the car or fortune with lemon glaze.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

lemon-filled-cupcakes.name: Lemon-filled Cupcakes
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 24 muffin cups with paper liners.
Beat lemon cake mix, water, vegetable oil, and eggs in a large bowl for 2 minutes.
Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling them about 2/3 full.
Bake cupcakes in the preheated oven until very lightly browned and a toothpick inserted into the middle of a cupcake comes out clean, 18 to 22 minutes. Cool cupcakes thoroughly.
Cut vegetable shortening and 1/4 cup butter together in a bowl with a pastry cutter until well mixed. Beat lemon juice into shortening mixture until creamy.
Stir 2 cups confectioners' sugar into shortening mixture, about 1/2 cup at a time, until filling is smooth. Set filling aside.

Place white chocolate into a microwave-safe bowl; heat in microwave on high for 15 seconds and stir chocolate. Continue heating in 15 second intervals, stirring between heating until white chocolate is melted and smooth.
For frosting, beat cream cheese and 1/2 cup butter together in a bowl until smooth and creamy. Stir in melted white chocolate and vanilla extract.
Gradually beat in 4 cups confectioners' sugar, alternating with drizzles of orange juice, to make a smooth and creamy frosting.
Cut holes through the top of each cupcake. Holes should be deep enough to put filling inside.
Spoon lemon filling into the holes.
Pipe cream cheese frosting on top of cupcakes; sprinkle with lemon zest.

lemongrass-pork-patties-with-vietnamese-.name: Lemongrass Pork Patties With Vietnamese Dipping Sauce

ingredients.prep: tough outer layers removed, lower 6 inches of tender bulb, finely chopped
such as nuoc mam or nam pla
such as Boston lettuce or iceberg
such as mint, cilantro and Thai basil

instructions: In a large bowl, use your hands to mix together all of the ingredients, then form the mixture into twelve 2-inch patties (about 3/4 inch thick). Arrange the patties on a plate and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes, until firm.

Preheat the grill for at least 10 minutes and set it up to grill over moderately high heat. Oil the grates. Grill the patties until brown grill marks form on the bottom, about 4 minutes. Flip the patties, then grill for 3 to 4 minutes longer, until cooked through but still juicy.
In a small mixing bowl, whisk the vinegar with the sugar and water. Add the fish sauce, then taste and season with more vinegar or sugar, depending on your taste.
Arrange the lettuce leaves and herb sprigs on a platter. To serve, wrap the pork patties and herb sprigs in lettuce and dip in the sauc

lemony-grilled-scallops-and-blistered-lo.name: Lemony Grilled Scallops And Blistered Long Beans

ingredients.prep: plus more for grill and drizzling

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt
. chinese long beans or green beans
Three or four 8" metal skewers or bamboo skewers

instructions: Whisk ⅓ cup fresh lemon juice, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 2 tsp. honey, 2 tsp. mild chile flakes, ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes, ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, and 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt in a small bowl. Add 12 dry large sea scallops, side muscle removed, patted dry, and turn to coat. Cover and chill 15 minutes (don’t be tempted to marinate scallops longer).

Meanwhile, prepare a grill for medium-high heat; clean and oil grate. Place 1 lb. Chinese long beans or green beans, trimmed, on a rimmed baking sheet, drizzle with oil, and turn to coat. Season with kosher salt.

Remove scallops from marinade, letting excess drip back into
bowl, and thread onto skewers. Place scallops on grate (if possible, arrange skewers
with handles hanging off edge of grill to make turning easier). Grill scallops until
just cooked through and deep brown marks appear, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a
large plate.

Arrange long beans on grate and grill, turning often with
tongs, until blistered and charred in spots, about 4 minutes.
Transfer long beans to a platter and arrange skewers on top. Drizzle with oil and squeeze juice from some lemon wedges over. Sprinkle with flaky sea salt. Serve with more lemon wedges.

life-of-the-party-layer-cake.name: Life-of-the-party Layer Cake

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: green, yellow, red, pink, and black food coloring

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: orange, green, red, and black food coloring
chocolate disks, dried fruits, candied citrus peel, and/or candied nuts (for filling)
a 2" ring cutter, a pastry bag fitted with a medium round tip, and a cake scraper

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Lightly coat pans with nonstick spray. Line bottom of each pan with a parchment paper round. Lightly coat parchment with nonstick spray. Whisk flour, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl. Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat sugar and butter in a large bowl, scraping down sides of bowl as needed, until pale and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Add eggs one at a time, beating well and scraping down sides of bowl after each addition.

Combine milk and vanilla in a measuring glass. Reduce speed to low; beat in dry ingredients in 3 additions, alternating with milk mixture in 2 additions, mixing well after each addition. Divide batter evenly among 6 small bowls (if using a scale, about 200 g each).

Color batter in each bowl with orange, green, yellow, red, pink, and black food coloring, adding and stirring in until you reach desired hue. Scrape a color of batter into each prepared pan; smooth surface. Bake cakes, rotating pans halfway through if browning too much in one spot, until tops spring back when very gently pressed and a tester inserted in the center comes out clean (go all the way to the bottom), 16–20 minutes. Transfer pans to wire racks and let cakes cool in pans 10 minutes. Run a small knife or offset spatula around inside of pans to loosen cakes, then turn out onto racks. Remove parchment and let cool completely (keep upside down).

Using clean beaters, beat butter on medium speed in a large bowl until smooth. Add cream cheese a few pieces at a time, beating until smooth. Beat in vanilla, then reduce speed to low and add powdered sugar a little at a time, beating until smooth. Mix in lemon juice and salt. Scoop 1 cup frosting into a small bowl; set aside. Add a few drops yellow food coloring to frosting in large bowl and stir well; add more until you reach desired hue.

Turn cakes over. Using ring cutter, punch out a hole in center of each cake except orange cake. Place half of yellow frosting in piping bag (a resealable bag with a corner cut off also will work). Pipe a circle of frosting onto a plate or cake stand. Place black cake on top and pipe several rings of frosting on top of cake. Stack pink cake on top, lining up center holes, and pipe several rings of frosting on top. Repeat with red, yellow, and green cakes.

Add desired fillings to center of cake. Place orange cake on top to close. Frost outside of cake in an even layer. (It doesn’t need to be perfect; this is just to trap all the loose bits of cake so the next layer will be more even.) Chill, uncovered, until frosting is firm, about 1 hour.

Coat cake in another layer of frosting, taking your time to make it even. If the frosting isn’t firm, chill another 30 minutes (important when you add the other colors). Divide reserved 1 cup frosting among 4 small bowls and add orange, green, red, and black food coloring to reach desired hue. Place dollops of each color of frosting all over cake. Run scraper around cake in one continuous motion to create smooth streaks of color.
Do ahead: Cake can be made 1 day ahead. Chill, uncovered.

little-lovers-of-loures-teleculinaria.name: Little Lovers Of Loures
instructions: Garnish a large tray with butter and sprinkle with flour. Reserve. Beat the yolk with sugar until you get a cream.
Add the lemon scrape, flour, yeast, cinnamon and olive oil (or melted lard) and stir well.
Add some water to get a homogeneous and moldable mass, and stir well.

Hit the light in castle with a pinch of salt and wrap it in the previous preparation. Mold a ball with the dough, extend it with the roll and cut cookies with taste-shaped. Have them on the tray and put them in the oven, preheated at 195oC, for about 7 to 10 minutes. Remove, let it cool, remove from the tray and let it cool completely.

liver-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Liver In The Oven
instructions: We buy four slices of liver, about 1 million dickness, good quality. Must be tight and shiny. Ask the butcher to piss it off — he usually does it anyway.
Preheat the evening in the air at 180°C.
Salt and pepper the liver slices on both sides according to our taste. Keep in mind that during cooking, along with the liquids that are rid of meat, part of salt and pepper is lost.
Place the slices on the grill and place a baking pan with some water underneath, so that the liquids are dripping there.
Bake the liver for 4–5 minutes on each side, turning it carefully to make evening. In total it will take about 10 minutes to make on the middle or top grill of the evening.
Then turn the evening into a grill at 200°C. If you prefer the liver more well cooked, leave it for an extra 2 minutes on each side.
Once cooked, place the liver on a platter, sprinkle with oregano and pour with plenty of lemon.
Optionally, you can add a few drops of aure oil for extra aroma and taste.
Serve with homemade French fries or season salad.

loris-cauliflower-au-gratin.name: Lori's Cauliflower Au Gratin

ingredients.prep: cut into small florets and stems reserved

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Chop cauliflower stems into small pieces. Measure out 1/2 cup of cauliflower florets and chop into small pieces. Set aside.
Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add cauliflower florets and cook uncovered until crisp tender, 4 to 5 minutes. Drain. Toss with Parmesan cheese and chives.
Preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Melt butter in a skillet over low heat. Add reserved stems and chopped florets, shallot, and garlic; cook and stir until tender but not brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a boil. Cook over high heat until broth evaporates completely, 8 to 10 minutes. Remove from heat.

Pour 1 cup heavy cream into the skillet and puree mixture with an immersion blender until smooth. Stir in horseradish, salt, and black pepper. Transfer to a baking dish and add blanched florets; toss to coat evenly with cream mixture. Drizzle with 2 tablespoons heavy cream and top with Gruyere cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 20 to 30 minutes.
